case_title: PALOU OAKDALE LLC VS. BAYSHORE STUDIO, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED BY MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALOU OAKDALE LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED JUN-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSHORE STUDIO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSHORE STUDIO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2178 PALOU AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
